summary: Soundboard recording of the second set shows improved but modest mix quality, capturing a high‑energy 1987 show with Mickey Hart celebrating his birthday.
review: The release presents a board‑derived mix of the second set that is noticeably better than previous sources, though it remains heavy on an omni mic and lacks full fidelity. The performance itself is described as very high energy with “twisted times” at the old Crack Centre, and Mickey Hart’s birthday enthusiasm adds a fun vibe. Overall the show is enjoyable despite the recording’s limitations.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a moderate 3‑star rating, noting both a decent performance and only fair recording quality; with limited data the rating reflects an average show plus modest technical sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix is heavy on board omni mic, not spectacular but improved over previous releases; some voices are prominent and overall clarity is limited.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second‑set only, described as very high energy with interesting musical nuggets and a festive vibe from Mickey Hart's birthday celebration.

band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey was feeling his B‑day oats, adding extra excitement to the performance.
